title: 咘咘和外公外婆去市民广场

pages.text: 咘咘和外公外婆去市民广场
pages.text_en: Bubu Goes to the Square with Grandpa and Grandma

pages.text: 今天天气真好！外公外婆要带咘咘去市民广场玩。咘咘好开心呀！
pages.text_en: What a beautiful day! Grandpa and Grandma were taking Bubu to the city square. Bubu was so excited!

pages.text: 咘咘和外公外婆一起坐公交车。咘咘坐在外婆旁边，看着窗外的风景。
pages.text_en: Bubu rode the bus with Grandpa and Grandma. She sat next to Grandma, looking at the view outside.

pages.text: 到啦！市民广场好大好漂亮！有花、有树、还有大喷泉！
pages.text_en: They arrived! The square was big and beautiful! There were flowers, trees, and a big fountain!

pages.text: 外婆拿出手机说：“咘咘，看这边！”咘咘转过头，眼睛看着镜头，笑一个！
pages.text_en: Grandma took out her phone. "Bubu, look over here!" Bubu turned around, looked at the camera, and smiled!

pages.text: 咔嚓！拍得真好看！因为咘咘看镜头了呀！拍照的时候，要看镜头哦！
pages.text_en: Click! What a pretty photo! Because Bubu looked at the camera! When taking photos, look at the camera!

pages.text: 外公也要给咘咘拍照。“咘咘，看外公这边！”咘咘看着镜头，笑眯眯！
pages.text_en: Grandpa wanted to take a photo too. "Bubu, look at Grandpa!" Bubu looked at the camera with a big smile!

pages.text: 咔嚓！又是一张好看的照片！因为咘咘记住了——拍照要看镜头！
pages.text_en: Click! Another lovely photo! Because Bubu remembered — look at the camera when taking photos!

pages.text: 外婆买了咘咘最喜欢的梅花糕！好香好甜！咘咘吃得好开心！
pages.text_en: Grandma bought Bubu's favorite plum blossom cake! So fragrant and sweet! Bubu ate it happily!

pages.text: 吃完梅花糕，再来拍一张！“咘咘，看镜头！”咘咘看着镜头，笑得好甜！
pages.text_en: After the cake, one more photo! "Bubu, look at the camera!" Bubu looked at the camera with the sweetest smile!

pages.text: 天黑了，该回家啦。咘咘坐公交车回家，靠在外婆怀里打瞌睡。
pages.text_en: It was getting dark, time to go home. Bubu rode the bus home, dozing off in Grandma's arms.

pages.text: 洗完澡，咘咘躺在小床上。今天和外公外婆拍了好多好多照片，每张都在看镜头呢！晚安咘咘！
pages.text_en: After her bath, Bubu lay in her little bed. Today she took so many photos with Grandpa and Grandma, and she looked at the camera in every one! Goodnight, Bubu!

title_en: Bubu Goes to the Square with Grandpa and Grandma
